app_subtitle: The missing open-source UI for EHRbase. Foundation milestone in progress.
auth_error_notice: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
me_emergency_warning: This grants access outside your normal care relationship, writes a special audit entry, and is reviewed by the audit team within 24 hours. Use only for genuine clinical emergencies.
me_emergency_error: Emergency access could not be granted.
me_emergency_forced_logout: Emergency-access limit reached. You have been signed out and must re-authenticate.
error_generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
not_found_body: The page you were looking for does not exist or may have moved.
a11y_intro: We are committed to making this clinical workspace usable by everyone, including people who rely on assistive technology.
a11y_standard_body: This application targets WCAG 2.2 level AA and the EN 301 549 procurement standard. Accessibility is treated as a release gate, not an afterthought.
a11y_known_issues_body: Screen-reader verification with NVDA and VoiceOver is scheduled before the v1.0 release. If you encounter a barrier, please tell us so we can prioritise a fix.
a11y_contact_body: Report an accessibility barrier and we will respond within five working days.
access_log_intro: Under Article 15 GDPR you can see who has accessed your records and when.
access_log_empty_body: Access entries will appear here once you have performed any actions on the system.
access_log_intro_self: Every action you have taken on the system, newest first.
access_log_load_failed: Could not load the access log. Please try again.
